explanation: The Start-up Mode is initiated at the next timepoint upon the combined event of pressing the power button and all required system connections (breathing circuit, air supply, power, and no patient) being established. This captures the 'initiated by' and 'once' clauses as a single, concurrent triggering condition, with a guarantee of satisfaction at the very next time step. This option is unique because decision1 is abstract with an empty bool_exp1, placing all trigger conditions into bool_exp2.
decision3: at the next timepoint satisfy bool_exp3
decision2_substring: by pushing the power button of the system once the system has been connected to the breathing circuit (without connection to the patient), the air supply, and the power source.
decision3_substring: The Start-up Mode shall be initiated
output_structured_natural_language: upon powerButton & breathingCircuitConnected & !patientConnected & airSupplyConnected & powerConnected, at the next timepoint satisfy StartUpMode
